entities.name: BAMBOO
entities.description: A fast-growing grass used in agroforestry for various purposes including fuel and fodder

entities.name: AGROFORESTRY
entities.description: A land use system that integrates trees or shrubs with crops and/or livestock

entities.name: GHANA
entities.description: A country in West Africa where bamboo agroforestry is being promoted

entities.name: NATURAL FOREST
entities.description: Native forest ecosystems providing wood fuels

entities.name: WOOD FUELS
entities.description: Fuel derived from wood, often sourced from natural forests

entities.name: BAMBOO ACCEPTABILITY
entities.description: The willingness of farmers to accept bamboo as part of their farming system

entities.name: BAMBOO ADOPTION
entities.description: The actual implementation and use of bamboo in farming systems

entities.name: SOCIOECONOMIC FACTORS
entities.description: Social and economic variables that influence decision-making in farming

entities.name: LOCAL FARMING PRACTICES
entities.description: Traditional methods and habits of farming used by local farmers

entities.name: LOCAL KNOWLEDGE
entities.description: Traditional knowledge held by farmers regarding bamboo and its uses

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The overall organization of agricultural activities on a farm

entities.name: DRY SEMI-DECIDUOUS FOREST ZONE
entities.description: A specific ecological zone in Ghana where the study was conducted

entities.name: SEMI-STRUCTURED QUESTIONNAIRE INTERVIEWS
entities.description: A data collection method involving interviews with a set of open-ended questions

entities.name: CHARCOAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of converting bamboo or wood into charcoal for fuel

entities.name: FODDER
entities.description: Agricultural produce, such as bamboo leaves, used to feed livestock

entities.name: AGE
entities.description: A demographic characteristic of farmers used as a predictor for bamboo adoption

entities.name: GENDER
entities.description: A demographic characteristic of farmers used as a predictor for bamboo adoption

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEM
entities.description: The pattern of crops grown on a piece of land over time
